sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46675" key="h(duloge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡδῠλογ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n46675.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">speak sweet things</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινι</itype> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0496.tlg001:3:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
